text:
Troy is a Glorzo parasite that formerly worked for Summer as a construction worker under her rule in the Glorzo Empire. He appears in the episode "Promortyus".

The body of Troy's host presumably crash landed or visited the Glorzo asteroid and was attacked and controlled by a Glorzo parasite. He is then seen greeting Steve as he mentions that what he and Jez are constructing will be ready tomorrow. Troy presumably died after Rick, Morty and Summer escaped the Glorzo asteroid and Morty's harmonica playing kills the entire Glorzo species.
